title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 60.471 - Use of term limited
text:
60.471.  Use of term limited. — The use of the term "Missouri State Plane Coordinate System" on any map, report of survey, or other document shall be limited to coordinates based on the Missouri state plane coordinate system as defined in sections 60.401 to 60.496.
(L. 1984 S.B. 479, A.L. 2023 H.B. 202 merged with S.B. 138)
